quicksight.template.sectionbasedlayoutpa: The options for a paper canvas of a section-based layout.

quicksight.template.sectionbasedlayoutpa.Description: Defines the spacing between the canvas content and the top, bottom, left, and right edges.
The paper orientation that is used to define canvas dimensions. Choose one of the following options:  + PORTRAIT+ LANDSCAPE
The paper size that is used to define canvas dimensions.
quicksight.template.sectionbasedlayoutpa.Allowed values: A0 | A1 | A2 | A3 | A4 | A5 | JIS_B4 | JIS_B5 | US_LEGAL | US_LETTER | US_TABLOID_LEDGER
